case_title: JOSE CECILIO CHAN NOVELO VS. SURIYA SRITHONG

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF NOVELO, JOSE CECILIO CHAN AS TO DEFENDANT SRITHONG, SURIYA AN INDIVIDUAL DBA SURIYA THAI RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NOVELO, JOSE CECILIO CHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SRITHONG, SURIYA AN INDIVIDUAL DBA SURIYA THAI RESTAURANT $26,948.18 PRINCIPAL, $168.38 INTEREST, $410.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $27,526.56, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
